name: GST IRP (IN) e-Invoicing
description: India GST e-invoice (IRP) adapter, contributed into invoice:adapter — sandboxed. Builds the real IRP JSON (schema 1.1), splits tax into CGST+SGST / IGST, and POSTs it to a tenant-configured IRP/GSP endpoint, which returns the IRN + signed QR. Ported from the built-in invoice_in_gst adapter.

settings.label: IRP / GSP Endpoint URL
settings.help: HTTP endpoint of your IRP/GSP/ASP integrator that accepts the IRP JSON and returns the IRN + signed QR. Leave empty to disable submission (the adapter returns noop).

settings.label: Supplier GSTIN
settings.help: Your 15-digit GST Identification Number. The first 2 digits are the state code.

settings.label: Supplier State Code
settings.help: GST state code, e.g. '29' for Karnataka. Defaults to the first 2 digits of the GSTIN when empty.

secrets.label: IRP Bearer Token
secrets.help: Optional bearer token for the IRP/GSP endpoint; injected host-side, never seen by the plugin.
